heading: Acceptance of other lands by Secretary of the Interior
label: 406d–4 Acceptance of other lands by Secretary of the Interior
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept the donation of the following-described lands, which lands, upon acceptance by the United States, shall become a part of the national park:sixth principal meridianTownship 41 north, range 116 west: Section 3, lots 1 and 2.Containing seventy-eight and ninety-three one-hundredths acres, more or less.
notes: Repeal of Inconsistent LawsRepeal of laws inconsistent with act , see note set out under .Sept. 14, 1950section 406d–1 of this title
